'''Dolman''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] officer during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] Dolman's [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] was shot down on approach to the [[Emperor's Retreat/Legends|Emperor's Retreat]], on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]], by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] in [[1 ABY/Legends|1.5 ABY]]. Dolman survived and Captain [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] then dispatched a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] to escort Dolman back to the [[Emperor's Retreat/Legends|Emperor's Retreat]]. The Rebels who had attacked him were later eliminated.<ref name="SWG:CT" />

==Behind the scenes==
Captain Dolman was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:CT" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Although, the captain was known as Dolman in the quest dialogues, his in-game character was identified as '''Dolmen'''.<ref name="SWG:CT" />
